gate: Substrate: REF-001 provides accepted bitemporal identity/event-storage substrate only
notes: REF-001 provides an accepted bitemporal identity/event-storage substrate only. It is preserved and not downgraded, but a storage substrate is not survivorship-free event authority. Non-blocking PASS.

gate: Event authority: launch/scheduled-delivery metadata and bounded trade observations do not establish complete event authority
evidence: DF-08-E03 (source object inventory), DF-08-E02 (source decision register), DF-08-E05 (RD-06 partial feasibility)
notes: Launch/scheduled-delivery metadata (e.g. Bybit launchTime; BTCUSDU26 scheduled future deliveryTime) and bounded trade observations exist in the accepted inventory, but they do not establish complete listing/delisting event authority across the universe. The scheduled future deliveryTime is not an observed completed delivery. Partial; blocking.

gate: Trade edges: bounded sample/archive timestamps must not be equated with exact listing/delisting events
evidence: DF-08-E03 (bounded earliest/latest timestamps within sampled/archive objects), DF-08-E04 (PIT reference plan)
notes: Retained evidence contains bounded earliest/latest timestamps within sampled/archive objects, not proven asset-lifetime first/last trades. These sample/archive edges must never be equated with exact listing/delisting lifecycle events. Partial; blocking.

gate: Timing: announcement known-time and effective-time history unproven
notes: Announcement known-time and effective-time histories are not proven from retained evidence. Point-in-time lifecycle timing cannot be asserted. Blocking.

gate: State transitions: historical state-transition and revision/vintage history unproven
evidence: DF-08-E04 (PIT reference plan), DF-08-E09 (REF-002 acceptance), DF-08-E13 (REF-003 acceptance)
notes: Historical state-transition sequences and revision/vintage histories are unproven from retained evidence. No retained vintages support reconstruction. Blocking.

gate: Delisted coverage: representative delisted/failed-asset coverage, final tradable price, and failure cause not demonstrated
evidence: DF-08-E03 (inventory), DF-08-E01 (DF-08 question/test), DF-08-E10 (REF-002 matrix), DF-08-E14 (REF-003 matrix)
notes: Representative delisted/failed-asset coverage, final tradable price, and failure cause are not demonstrated. Coverage is partial and cannot support survivorship-free universe construction. Blocking.

gate: Licensing: required source licensing and internal raw-retention authority not established
evidence: DF-08-E07 (REF-002 ticket), DF-08-E11 (REF-003 ticket), DF-08-E09/E13 (acceptances NO AUTHORITY)
notes: Required source licensing and internal raw-retention authority are not established. Authority to retain/use the raw lifecycle records is unproven. Blocking.

gate: Reconstruction test: DF-08 required known-delisting reconstruction test not passed
evidence: DF-08-E01 (DF-08 known-delisting reconstruction test), DF-08-E05 (research data decisions)
notes: The DF-08 required known-delisting reconstruction test (reconstruct a known delisting; confirm series ends at correct date with no silent drop) has not been passed from retained evidence. Blocking.
